# Stakeholder Update Template

**Owner:** [Stakeholder Sponsor](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#stakeholder-sponsor) / [Project Manager](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#project-managers)  
**Used by:** Project Manager, Stakeholder Sponsor, Product Manager  
**When to use:** Use for monthly (or milestone-triggered) written updates sent to senior stakeholders and sponsors. Adapt cadence to project risk and stakeholder expectations.

---

## Update Metadata

- Project name:
- Reporting period:
- Prepared by:
- Date:
- Distribution list:

---

## Overall Status

| Dimension | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|

| Scope | `🟢 On Track` / `🟡 At Risk` / `🔴 Off Track` | |
| Budget / Resources | `🟢 On Track` / `🟡 At Risk` / `🔴 Off Track` | |
| Quality | `🟢 On Track` / `🟡 At Risk` / `🔴 Off Track` | |
